task_completion.description: Log in to OpenCAD as the administrator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., admin@opencad.local or an Admin panel link is visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page or tab displaying a list of users, account management, or admin settings is open.

task_completion.description: Open the edit interface for the target user
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Edit User' modal or page is open specifically for 'Dispatch Officer' (dispatch@opencad.local or DISP-01).

task_completion.description: Grant supervisor privileges to the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: The setting for 'Supervisor' or 'Supervisor Privilege' is toggled on, checked, or set to 'Yes'/'1' in the edit user form.

task_completion.description: Do not modify admin privilege or approved status
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the edit form, the 'Admin' privilege remains unselected/unchanged, and the 'Approved' or 'Active' status remains checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Save the updated user account settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification indicating the user was updated, or the user list is visible again showing the updated supervisor role for 'Dispatch Officer'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions take place within a web browser navigating the OpenCAD interface, not via terminal commands (e.g., curl or mysql).

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by editing the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing terminal-based database clients, phpMyAdmin, or direct SQL queries being executed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the live OpenCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost and the OpenCAD interface is fully rendered, rather than a local text editor or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target user to be modified is 'Dispatch Officer' with the email 'dispatch@opencad.local'. The admin user is 'admin@opencad.local'. The expected outcome is that the supervisor privilege is enabled (set to 1) for the target user, while all other attributes like admin privilege and approved status remain in their original state.
